introduction:
Ich bin Softwareingenieur in Paris. Aktuell arbeite ich bei AWS im Blu Age Mainframe-Modernisierungsbereich. Mein Fokus liegt auf Automatisierung, Codequalitaet und zuverlaessiger Lieferung.

Neben Software Engineering interessiere ich mich stark fuer kuenstliche Intelligenz und deren praktischen Einsatz in Produktteams.

Ich unterrichte auch gerne: Mathematik, Informatik, Algorithmen und strukturiertes Problemloesen.

Ausserhalb der Arbeit spiele ich Tennis, loese Programmieraufgaben und verbringe Zeit mit meiner Familie.
FAMILY_DESC: Cherish moments with wife and children.
TEACHING_DESC: Personalisierte Betreuung in Mathematik und Informatik fuer verschiedene Niveaus.
MATH_TUTORING_DESC:
Whether you are in high school, preparing for competitive exams, or studying in an engineering school, I offer comprehensive tutoring in Mathematics to strengthen your foundations and excel in exams.

Topics Covered:
  • High school (algebra, geometry, calculus)
  • University-level courses (linear algebra, differential equations)
  • Competitive exams (prépa, école d’ingénieur)

Key Benefits:
  • Deep understanding of concepts
  • Problem-solving strategies
  • Personalized pace and approach
CS_TUTORING_DESC:
From programming basics to advanced algorithms, I provide expert guidance in Computer Science tailored to your goals and experience level.

Topics Covered:
  • Programming Languages (Python, Java, etc.)
  • Algorithms and Data Structures
  • Web Development (HTML/CSS, Angular)
  • AI and Machine Learning Basics

Key Benefits:
  • Practical, hands-on learning
  • Real-world problem-solving
  • Guidance for projects and assignments
SCHEDULE: Schreib mir, um eine Session zu planen.
GET_IN_TOUCH_DESC: Wenn du Fragen hast oder zusammenarbeiten moechtest, melde dich gerne.

projects.name: Waste detection
projects.description:
Computer Vision, Python, Tensorflow. Detection and classification of diverse type of waste as part of my semester project. Grade: 20/20.
  • Developed a piece of code to test a pre-trained neural network (provided in checkpoints files), and evaluated its performances with classical metrics: 0.8 precision, 0.4 recall, 0.5 F1-score
  • Built and cleaned a large dataset of∼ 4k pictures and implemented YOLO model (based on the oﬃcial research paper)

projects.name: Text classifier
projects.description:
NLP, Python, Scikit-Learn, Jupyter Notebook.
  • Explored various NLP tools & text preprocessing methods
  • Compared several supervised models and picked the best one: obtained an accuracy > 95 %

projects.name: Check the place
projects.description:
Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Git.
  • Built an Angular web application for students where they can share places they visited
  • Designed & implemented about 10 screens. Deployment on Azure Cloud for the presentation

projects.name: Image labelling with VoTT
projects.description: Python. A way to label images for computer vision using VoTT.

projects.name: Propagation of mechanical waves in muscles
projects.description:
Python, LabView, Physics concepts.
  • Participated in the development of a software capable of analyzing the signal generated by the wave
  • Measured the celerity of the wave & physically modelled the arm by a Melde rope

RESUME_DESC: Ein kurzer Ueberblick ueber meinen beruflichen Weg, Ausbildung und Kompetenzen.

experiences.description:
Java, Angular, AI, LLMs, AWS. Involved as a Full Stack Engineer on AWS Mainframe modernization. Mainly focused on whole modernization process to deliver customer with reliable modern code. Implemented AI tools to increase code quality and automate modernization steps.
  • Software Engineer II (Oct. 2024 - Present)
  • Software Engineer I (Jan. 2023 - Sept. 2024)

• Led the development of the new internal payroll software using Angular & Go
  • Developed a calculation engine using Python to automate the computations of employees wages
  • Built a tool for image annotation & waste prediction (Angular & Python Flask)
  • Leveraged Docker server-side to containerize Frontend and Backend to allow for easy deployment and scalability

Worked in the innovation department as part of my master thesis (grade: 17/20).
  • Built a dataset and implemented several Machine Learning models for investment advice & profiling
  • Built, extended and optimized REST API endpoints for an online banking
  • Set up a HTTPS reverse proxy in a Linux containerized environment with NGINX, Docker and AWS

Worked as a freelance software developer in parallel with my studies.
  • Involved as the main frontend developer of two web applications in production using Angular
  • Created and led projects presentations to the General Management
Completed edX DAT263x (Introduction to AI) & used Azure Cloud to discover various AI tools
